Category: Soul Soldier

Soul Defense Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (40 percent)

Soul Warframe Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (20%)

Soul Hand Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (Sansei)

Soul Spear Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (Sansei)

------

Category: Soul Soldier

Soul Defense Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (30 Percent)

Soul Armor Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (Sansei)

Soul Hand Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (Sansei)

Soul Spear Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (Forty Percent)

......

Ye Tian looked at the talent of this soul warrior, and was extremely surprised, such a talent was much better than the previous soul creatures, all of them were pseudo-mystery-level soul talents, plus the soul strength was very powerful.

It can be said that in terms of combat effectiveness, Ye Tian is estimated to not necessarily be comparable to these two soul soldiers.

However, what made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief was that these two soul soldiers did not attack Ye Tian immediately, but just asked Ye Tian not to enter the Hades Temple.

"How can I enter the Temple of Hades?"

Ye Tian stared at the two soul warriors and asked.

"Beat us!"

One of the Soul Warriors said.

Ye Tian didn't say a word and left.

He wasn't sure he could defeat these two soul soldiers right now, and if his soul was damaged, he wasn't a joke, although he could use the green bead to recover, but if the damage was too severe, the impact would be too great.

So, he left for the time being.

However, when leaving, he copied the soul talents of these two soul soldiers, and once he fused these soul talents, it would be too simple to beat these two soul soldiers.

Swish!

Ye Tian stayed away from here and came to a quiet place, where he began to fuse his soul defense talent.

"Fusion of three pseudo-arcane level soul defense talents!"

Ye Tian began to fuse.

Half an hour later, Ye Tian successfully fused three percent of the pseudo-mystery-level soul defense talent, making his soul defense talent fifty percent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian fused another forty-percent pseudo-mystery-level defense talent, and it took half an hour to successfully turn his soul defense talent into eighty percent!

Eighty percent soul defense talent, what a terrifying soul talent this is!

"Continue to merge!"

Ye Tian successively fused the Soul Battle Armor talent, the Soul Hand talent, and the Soul War Spear talent.

In this way, Ye Tian's soul talent situation has changed greatly.

Talent Identification
Human: Ye Tian
Soul Defense Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (80%)
Soul Armor Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (40%)
Soul Hand Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (50%)
Soul Spear Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (60%)
Soul Transfer Talent: Top
Enhanced Soul Talent: Top

......

"My strength has increased dramatically, and I should be able to easily defeat those two soul soldiers!"

Ye Tian said with confidence,

Immediately, Ye Tian came to the Hades Temple again.

Rumble!!!

The two soul warriors stopped Ye Tian again.

"You two, you said that as long as you defeat you, you can enter the Temple of Hades, don't you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

One of the soul warriors answered.

"Okay, I'll challenge you two!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

The two soul soldiers nodded at the same time.

Suddenly, a wave of soul ripples emanated from the dilapidated Hades Temple, sweeping across the area.

In the blink of an eye.

Ye Tian found that he had come to another world, like a void space, and the two soul soldiers had also come here.

"The challenge begins!"

Soul Warrior Road.

"Soul Warframe Talent, Open!"

A set of gorgeous and powerful battle armor appeared on top of Ye Tian's immortal soul, enveloping Ye Tian's immortal soul, making the entire immortal soul full of majesty and domineering.

Then, Ye Tian opened the soul defense talent and the enhanced soul talent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian used the Soul Hand Talent and the Soul War Spear talent, and a war spear full of soul mysteries appeared in Ye Tian's hand, making Ye Tian's soul even more imposing!

"Fight!"

Ye Tian shouted, and the power of the Chaos Dao was blessed on his body, and he merged into the soul war spear in the form of a war spear.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the two soul soldiers.

Burst!!!

With just one spear, Ye Tian completely penetrated one of the soul soldiers, and the terrifying power directly seriously injured the other party.

Puff puff puff!!

With a spear stabbing down, the two soul warriors were no match at all, and they quickly dissipated.

Then.

The void changed, and Ye Tian returned to his original place.

At this time, the two soul soldiers turned into stone statues again.

Ye Tian tried to walk over, but the two soul soldiers did not appear again, obviously unable to stop Ye Tian.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered this temple, which looked very ordinary, but as soon as he stepped into it, the void transformed.

The next moment.

Ye Tian came to a special void, where a glorious Great Shore Temple was located, exuding supreme coercion.

In terms of momentum, it seems that even the supreme hall of the human race is inferior to this temple.

"This is the real Temple of Hades!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

Before, the temple building he saw was not the Hades Temple at all, but he misunderstood.

He thought that the Hades Temple that the two soul soldiers were talking about was the temple, but now he knew that the Hades Temple that the two soul soldiers were talking about meant the glorious temple in front of him.

In the records of the human race, there is no ghost world and the temple of Hades, and it is clear that these must not be the remnants of this cosmic era, but the previous cosmic era, or even a longer era.

Every era of the universe, developed to the end, will inevitably be amazingly achieved, so it is impossible for only the two places of the Ruins World and the Yuan Gu Hall to exist from the Great Destruction of the Universe.

The Ghost Realm and the Temple of Hades are definitely strange places that have survived the Great Destruction of the Universe.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew to the Hades Temple, wanting to know what the fate of the Hades Temple was.

Soon, Ye Tian flew to the door of the main hall of the Hades Temple.

Originally, the main hall was closed, but when Ye Tian arrived, the main hall gate opened.

When Ye Tian entered the Hades Temple, there was a sound of surprise.

"Hey, it's not a ghost clan!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian was startled at first, and then calmed down again.

"May I ask if Your Excellency is the instrument spirit of the Hades Temple?"

Ye Tian asked.

Wow!

A woman in white appeared in front of Ye Tian.

The woman in white had a blue face and a single horn, but her overall appearance was like a human beauty, and she didn't look hideous.

"Yes, I am the instrument spirit of the Hades Temple! In the past, many creatures entered the Hades Temple, but they were all members of the ghost clan, but now there is a ghost clan, you must have something wrong with the ghost clan, right?" said lightly.

"Yes, the ghost race has been wiped out by our human race!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

He was not afraid that this machine spirit would avenge the ghost clan, after all, the ghost clan had no special relationship with this machine spirit.

"Don't worry, the ghost clan will be destroyed when it is destroyed. The potential of the ghost clan is just like that, so many people have come, and they have only obtained some shallow inheritances, and they have not even obtained a slightly superior inheritance of our Hades civilization, so it is better to destroy them!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

"Hades civilization?"

When Ye Tian heard about this civilization for the first time, he asked, "Lord Instrument Spirit, I don't know where the Hades Civilization came from?"

Facing Ye Tian's question, Ji Ling smiled and said, "It's okay, it's okay to tell you. According to records, the Hades civilization belongs to the seventh cosmic era, and your cosmic epoch should be the thirteenth cosmic era!"

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Hades civilization turned out to be a civilization six epochs ago! What a civilization this is, and its existence is definitely a few cosmic epochs older than the world of relics!
